JUDGE PAUL H. ALVARADO, CLERK NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER JOE VICKSTEIN. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON DEC-16-2002 AT 10:45 AM IN DEPT. 602, DONALD S. MITCHELL. CASE SETTLED, SENT TO PUT TERMS ON THE RECORD.
MINUTES FOR DEC-16-2002 10:45 AM FOR DEPT 602

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRIWA CENTER INVESTMENTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVERSTAR COACH LINES,INC. WANG, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 728 PACIFIC AVENUE, UNIT 113, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JAN-31-2003, LEASE FORFEITED, FORFEIT OF SECURITY DEPOSIT $2,250 TO PLAINTIFF. SEE SCANNED DOC

JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: DIANNE BOFFI, REPORTER: LELAND BATARA. APPEARANCES: MR. EDWARD JEW, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF AND DAVID WANG, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER. CASE WAS CALLED TO PUT SETTLEMENT ON THE RECORD. STIPULATED JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON DEC-16-2002 IN DEPT. 602 (DSM/602)
